_publications._publicationTitle: Pilot study of the effectiveness of a telehealth group for improving peer relationships for adolescents with neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Group-level improvements in social functioning on norm-referenced measures were observed following the intervention based on caregiver report, even though the majority of individuals with NF1 (63%) in this sample showed broadly average range social challenges at baseline
details: Improvements in social functioning observed even in context of mild social difficulties, with 63% of participants showing broadly average range social challenges at baseline
